name: ICMP Packet Drop via Security Checks
description: Cisco detection for ICMP packets were dropped by the Secure Firewall ASA because of security checks added by the stateful ICMP feature that are usually either ICMP echo replies without a valid echo request already passed across the Secure Firewall ASA or ICMP error messages not related to any TCP, UDP, or ICMP session already established in the Secure Firewall ASA.

rules.name: ICMP Packet Drop via Security Checks

author: James Vargas
